meta.dc:title: Acts to be by ordinance; enacting clause

section.heading: Acts to be by ordinance; enacting clause

content.p: In addition to such acts of the council as are required by other provisions of this Charter to be by ordinance, every act of the council establishing a fine or other penalty or granting a franchise, shall be by ordinance. The enacting clause of all ordinances adopted by the council shall be substantially as follows: "The city council of the City of Mountain View does ordain as follows:"
